uplink._note: Derived from the upstream TTN example telemetry frame (fPort 3, 23 bytes) with the battery (bytes 9-10 = 365 cV -> 3.65 V), onboard temperature (byte 17 = 22 -> 22 C), and humidity (byte 18 = 55 -> 55 %) bytes adjusted to physically plausible in-bounds values; magnetometer bytes (11-16) set to xyz = 100/300/-300. expected.data computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input and applying the authored vocabulary mapping (volt->battery, temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity; alarms/magnetometer/frameCounter as extras).

Upstream TTN example parameter packet input; expected.data computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js. This frame carries only device configuration fields (no vocabulary measurements), all emitted as camelCase extras.
Upstream returns errors:['unknown FPort'] for any fPort != 3; verified against reference/upstream-codec.js.
Upstream returns errors:['wrong length'] for any payload that is neither a 23-byte telemetry frame nor a 16-byte type-0x03 parameter packet; verified against reference/upstream-codec.js.
